name: One-Serving Cheese Puff
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 slice White or whole wheat bread, buttered
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut bread into strips; place with buttered sides down along the sides and bottom of a 10-oz. custard cup.
2. In a bowl, lightly beat the egg. Add milk, cheese, onion salt, salt, and hot pepper sauce.
3. Pour the mixture into the custard cup.
4. Place on a baking sheet.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 35-40 minutes or until puffy and golden brown. Serve immediately.
